title: Production Evals For Agentic AI Systems - Nishant Gupta, Meta Superintelligence Labs
summary: Nishant Gupta from Meta discusses production evaluation approaches for autonomous AI agents that go beyond offline benchmarks. The talk covers continuous evaluation pipelines, online vs offline evaluation architectures, human-in-the-loop systems, and methods for detecting drift and hallucinations in agentic workflows at scale.
writeup: Nishant Gupta of Meta Superintelligence Labs presents production evaluation methods for autonomous AI agents, moving past offline benchmarks toward continuous evaluation in live systems. The talk contrasts online and offline evaluation architectures, covers human-in-the-loop review, and addresses detecting drift and hallucinations across multi-step agentic workflows at scale. It matters because agents that use tools and chain multiple steps require observability and ongoing monitoring rather than one-time benchmark scores. Key takeaways: continuous evaluation pipelines, separated online and offline evaluation, and human-in-the-loop checks for catching failures in production.
